column1: Hey CJ, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
sup were you still looking for help from us with spring break?
Yes 100%, our spring break is March 9-13, so any dates around then
okay bet! I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
We were looking into punta Cana, but really we are looking for the most fun price friendly tropical trip
yea for sure. Honestly Punta Cana's got it for sure. I'm there every year
how many ppl in your group so far?
I mean we are wanting to get prices and stuff but I'm assuming around 10-15
Oh dope we had a few groups from your school in the past. y'all def know how to party lol
gonna send this info rn, how soon were y'all lookin to get things planned?
I mean soon if possible. Within the next couple weeks
got you, ill add the payment plan which allows you to reserve with a deposit and then worry about the rest of the stuff after a few weeks
cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
just sent that over lmk if it came through
It came through, what is the difference between the two resorts for punta canta? Why is one more expensive?
the Riu Republica is a Riu chain resort which tends to be more expensive. think of it as like a marriott or hilton here at home. just has the name
its also an predominantly adults resort. so it leans a little more expensive

the occidental punta cana is more of a college friendly resort. we throw our pool parties and beach parties there during the season. its where i'll personally be. id recommend it, save the money and experience is a little bit better

Nice okay that sounds good. Be honest though, I could probably recruit close to 20-25 people if I could get the price a little lower. Is that flexible at all if I'm able to recruit like 10 more people?
yea bro, lets plot, lemme see what I can do. you down for the occidental punta cana package? I can finesse that one the most since I'll be there

Yea the occidental would be what we would do, but for me to get the at many I would probably need the all inclusive to be like 400$, considering the flights are 560 at the lowest. If that's possible lmk, because I could get a ton of people coming
Is that doable you think? If yall can't come down that low I'm sure I could still get more people to come
Yoo my bad bro didn't see your response

$400 is tough tbh bro. Kinda unheard of for an all inclusive stay. You get unlimited drinks and unlimited food on the resort. As well as all access to amenities, transportation from the airport when you land, and back

At your group size, for a 4 night stay, I can get you down to $579 at 4 ppl per room. It'll be a tough stretch with the rest of my team but I should be able to pull it off. We'd just have to 100% get to 25+ ppl
Okay I will do some recruiting and I am pretty sure I could get that done. When you say unlimited drinks, I'm assuming that doesn't mean alcohol correct?
That would be insane if it did
You literally have to spend no money on food or drink while on the trip
Okay I really think I can get it done. Do you have like a slideshow or a video that shows all the different things we would get to sell them?
we'll make a slide show specifically for your group. heres a video you can send out in the meantime tho https://youtu.be/XbgROM_7E2Y
Will you email it, or send it through text?
yoo what's up brotha, i'll have that texted over in a few hours, just waiting on the marketing team
All good man. I've got a lot of guys excited and saying they are down to go
Wanna get them committed before while I still can Yk haha
Feel you bro! here's everything you need
Awesome man. I'm going to get them all on board, I will lyk if they have any questions

Is there anyway I can extend that free booze cruise to if I get my group to sign up and pay deposit by 11/16? If not all good, I was just wondering. Also, I will tell them they would each pay $579 for a four person room correct? I know we agreed on it, but it doesnt say the price on the slideshow and i just want to make sure.
Thank you again for the help, you've been clutch so far
yoo whats good bro. was tied up yesterday
the price is on page 3 of that slide deck. it shows the $579 discount
lemme check and see if I can do 11/16 deadline. asking ops rn. will there be a few people that can get in before the 16th, or would everyone be waiting til the last day?
I mean I assume most people will wait to put money down, but if you can get an incentive I can get more people to put money down before the 16th
Feel you. Did you look through the slides? There's already two incentives in there bro
Oh yea I saw those, but the date for the booze cruise said the 9th, so I was just going to see if I could get that pushed back a week yk
Yea workin on getting that approved. The other incentive is price. Everyone else is paying $646 for that same package. Without the booze cruise
Im pulling a lot of strings to get this right for you bro lol
Ik dude ik don't worry about it. I'm making the gc now and gonna start recruiting
I really appreciate all the help you are giving. It's gonna be an awesome week
Of course bro. We're gonna turn up
I'll know in the morning about the booze cruise incentive extension
Okay good deal. How do we get the payment process started?
Soon as I can get that approved I'll open up a reservation and send it over. There'll be a bunch of open rooms and slots the guys can start hopping in and making their deposits
When they hop in it'll prompt them through the process where they create an account for themselves. That's where they'll enter their own info and make their own payments
I got the green light to extend the booze cruise deal to the 16th and keep the price at $579 if the group is 20+
We'll just need a couple guys to get in and deposited before the 16th to get it active, and the rest as long as they are on or before the 16th
Okay sounds good. Are you free to call today at all? I just want to make sure I have an accurate assessment of the trip
yea bro, what times you got in between classes
I actually am free anytime from now until 1 oclock
And then after 6 I will be good if you can't now
all good lets run it I'll call you in 10ish
itll be from our main line its an 888 # just a heads up
Something messed up, try it again

On the slideshow you sent it said the downpayment was $75, but the link to pay says the first payment of 200$ is due the 16th. Is that just a typo in the link? I thought you said I had two weeks to let everyone get their downpayment down, which I assumed was $75
Yea the deposit is $200 now bro. may be a little tough for me to stretch that one with along with everything else
No you're good I wasn't asking I was just trying to clear it up
cool yea my apologies on that. didnt realize the presentation still said $75 deposit. that was what it was about a month ago

Okay cool. I'm going to be able to get a few of us to get our downpayments down by the 16th to the the free booze cruise, and then I should have the majority of people ready by the 23rd. We might have a few stragglers that join and pay late
okay cool. yea keep me posted on whatever you need bro
also will say man, just a heads up - people that are stragglers waiting past the 16th, theres no guarantee I can keep that same $579 price for them
we should be fine, but theres no guarantee. just want to put it out there now so there arent any surprises if so
Okay sounds good thank you for telling me. I will have 95% of people signed up by the 23rd, considering I just told them about the trip 2 days ago
makes sense, all good bro. we should be fine just wanted to give you the heads up just in case
Okay well hopefully that doesn't happen. I might lose some people if it gets raised on them, and that would suck
yea I got you. we'll do what we can, dont worry too much
Yo, Ik it's late, but is there anyway I could call you right now? It won't be long
If not tomorrow works just as good no worries
Yooo let's do tomorrow bro, I'm about to board a flight. Wouldn't be avail for another 2.5-3hrs
Unless you'll be around then, more than down to hop on
I will be awake then. Let me know when you land
I'm actually about to hit the hay. We can do this tomorrow sometime
Was just about to text you
Just got to my location, but let's rap tomorrow
Alright good deal. I'll lyk when
Are you good to go right now?
Yooo, I can in about in hour that cool?
I have a meeting I forgot about, you good to call in like another hour?
Yup! Apologies I'm a little behind
Just shoot me a text when you're good
I'm good now if you are
Sup brotha that was me that just called. I'm around the next 3 hours or so any time
All good, I actually figured it out doing a little research. Sorry to bother you man, looking forward to talking soon
All good bro, what was it? Just curious lol
I was just info abt the resort,like number of bars and the quality of rooms

yoo! okay cool yea, the resort is dope bro tbh. when it comes to amenities, room size, cleanliness, etc it def doesnt feel like a college spring break resort. feels a lot more upscale. but, pair that with a bunch of college students, pool parties, beach parties, and late nights lol
if you ever want to hop on call though just shoot me a text, I'm here. saw you got your spot reserved and a few others put their names in so far. if anyone has any questions lmk
Yessir will do. I am pushing them to get signed up sooner rather than later, but Yk how it goes
I'm still confident I will get 20 people though. It's just harder to get them to put a down payment down than I thought
yea for sure, I know how it is bro. theyll all follow suit soon
im confident for you. your group is gonna be dope
lookin forward to meeting y'all too
Yea it's gonna be an awesome week

Whatsup man, I got like 7 guys to get payments in by tonight, so that should guarantee the Booze cruise like we discussed on the phone. Not gonna be a problem getting 20 by next week, everybody seems pretty excited for the trip. Also, might be able to get abt 15 girls to sign up as well. Not gonna guarantee it but they have talked about joining our trip as well
So our trip might end up being abt 40 people by the end of this haha
I'll text you about adding rooms if that will be necessary
Lets run it bro. lets def get the girls in y'all gonna have that much more fun lol
Bro you gotta hook me up with the penthouse if I get that to happen hahaha
This has felt like a full time job recruiting bro
lmao, bro I feel you and hear you. it aint easy
if you get to 40 I'll do what I can to get you a free stay. get you reimbursed
or atleast half off at the very least
Dude that would actually be awesome. I'll try my best
Lmk if you need anything else to help you get everyone going
Could you add two more rooms for me?
Just saw we have Brock in a room by himself, any word whats good there?
Yea he's got a couple buddies that haven't signed up yet, I told them they have until the end of the week to sign up and pay.
and the 7 of you that deposited have the free booze cruise added
The free booze cruise will be available to the guys that pay before this Sunday as well correct? I thought that's what we decided on the phone.
Lemme see what I can swing. it was initially everyone who deposited by 16th would get the booze cruise added
I'll run it by the team quick. already told them about your group and what youre trying to do
Oh dude I thought you said it would be for everyone if I could get some guys to put there money down be the 16th, since I had just told them about the trip on like the 13th
I hope I didn't understand you wrong, that's what I've been telling everyone
All good bro, we mustve misunderstood eachother. lets see what I can do
Okay I really appreciate it man
Aightttt bro heres the gameplan. I can't let the free booze cruise deal linger too long. it's really a $75 event you're getting for free + the discount I gave you
Buttt I got it extended for everyone who hops in up to Monday the 24th
Dude that's money. I really appreciate it, and I will let them know
We will have some people join after that, but I will just make it clear they will have to pay
Okay cool bro. yea lets see where we are when that time comes
Sorry to be contacting you so late, but could I give you a quick ring to give you an update on our trip and clear some things up? If not we can call tomorrow no worries at all
whats up bro, ill give you a call in 5

How big of a deal would it be to not put the second payment down today if we still finish the whole payment by the end of December? I have some guys that are going to pay and go just would rather not pay today.
We can swap out the payment today for a full final payment on Dec 15
lmk if you'd rather that. less time overall but no payment today
Yea I will let them know. I'll lyk what they say.
Yea you can switch it to the full thing due by the 15th. Thanks
When you get a chance, could you remover Andrew Kizer, Neil pillow, and cooper Macbeth?
It doesn't have to be tonight I just know they aren't coming. Gonna get some guys to take their spots
Yo! whats good bro. cool, you got an idea of whos gonna replace them?
Yea I got one guy gonna sign up tonight for my room, and then I will just need one more to make it the even 12
Word just have that one person hop in room 3 in the TBA slot
Assuming Joe's going in your room right
Yes thank you, and could you also move Brock Laesigg to room 3
So room 1 will be the only one that doesn't have a fourth
and lookin for that last person for the open slot in room 1?
These plane tickets are insane man. The one we got went up $300 in 2 weeks
yea bro, its crazy how busy march gets with travel
glad you got on it early
I know I am too. I appreciate the help
Whats good big dog, we got a couple guys behind on your res
Cooper Q and Joe Hayes havent made any payments, they still rollin?
Let me ask and make sure
Joe is, Cooper Q is not
hey bro so Coop is out right, and for the first room, is it just gonna be 3 people?
Yes, they are looking for someone to take that fourth spot but not having any luck so far.
word. if we don't find anyone those two rooms will be switched to 3 person occupancy. the cost for those ppl will go up a tiny bit
Alright when do they need to find someone by
would say asap my man. whenever ops team hits me up again about the empty slots they may force close them
Okay all good. I'll let them know
whats up brotha. wanted to give you the heads up ops team closed down the two empty slots, which changes room type on two of the rooms to a 3 person room

the people in those rooms will see a slight balance on their accounts. lmk if you found anyone that can hop in those spots. otherwise I can spread the balance amongst the group so that everyone has like $15 left to pay
except brock he's a payment behind still
Okay thank you for the update, I think splitting the money up to 15 more a person would be ideal. I'll let them know
And Brock just told me he will get his last payment in when his paycheck comes in, which is the 8th
Lmk what the group wants to do with the balance
We are all on board with splitting it up. Could you give me like 3 days to see if these other two guys want to come with us? Before charging the money
hey bro yea just let me know
Sorry for the late update, but you can go ahead and charge the 15 to everyone and take away the extra spots
all good bro. will do that now. theres a couple guys that already paid the balance difference tho. actually most of them
what do you want to do about that? if Igo and re even the accounts out, some guys will be owed about $10
we can reimburse them. but just lmk how you want to go about it
I evened out the pricing for now
Are you free to call in like 10?
Just figure it out in one conversation
Actually never mind I think I am following you, however you can even it out where everyone pays the same thing do that. I see you split the cost already between everyone
So if that means refunding people who have paid more than 593 that's what we want to do
He's forgot, I just reminded him I think he is paying now
hey brother, brock hasn't paid yet
Dang dude, I'll see him tonight and I will get on him. He for sure is gonna pay it's just taking him a little. He's too deep in to not pay haha
hey whenever you have a min, if you could have everyone upload their flight info so we can schedule airport transfers

Is there anyway to free up 3 more spots? I have three guys tell me last minute they are gonna go if it's through a company or just reserving it straight through the hotel. If it's not possible not a big deal was just going to try to save them some money
potentially bro. they ready to make the full payment today?
670 per person for a 3 person room. way cheaper than getting through the resort itself
Let me get it figured out with them if they are 100% down. Not gonna go through another begging them to pay situation. I'll lyk within the next couple days if they want to do that or not
okay word bro. the sooner the better. things are slim
Yea I get it. I don't really know these guys that well so if they don't get back to me I could care less
Looking forward to this trip though. Weather has been looking good down there already
gonna be a good time bro
yoyo are Sykes, Brock, or Evan on the same flight as you?
No they are not. I'll remind them to do flight info

Hey Man, I just saw that email you sent sorry it took me a couple days. We do have the booze cruise like you said we would before correct? The email says we have to pay 75 to get it added on I was just making sure we still have that like we talked about earlier
y'all got the booze cruise already yup. there may be a couple guys that hopped in late that dont tho
None of the guys that are in the trip right now joined late? We didn't add anyone late we just had 2 people drop out
So I don't know who you would be referring too
everyone who hopped in before Nov 24 got the free booze cruise
guys that hopped in after, didnt
Okay I didn't know that. Who would that be
yea I let you know about it early on, should be here in our text thread I'll scroll up to find
Brock hopped in 12/8, Joe Hayes 12/17, Sykes 11/30

I found the text, that's my fault I had it wrong in my head. Is it gonna be possible to split the cost of the booze cruise for those 3 throughout our entire group as well? I had told them wrong so I feel bad them having to pay all of that
ah man. I actually went through with ops and shaved the previous price difference off for each of you just to zero things out and make it easy
we can def do it tho
itll be $15 more per person. but we'd have to blitz it and have it paid off today so we can continue the process
Could you actually just charge the whole 150 to my account, and then I will get them to individually Venmo me. Seems more likely it gets paid today if we go that route
you sure bro? yea we can do that
Yea it's all good. This one's on me so I'll take it on the chin
I will get it paid rn
yoyo is Sykes on the same flight as anyone else in the group
I just texted him again sorry man. I really have no idea
all good bro, yea we just needa sched his transportation
He's an idiot and hasn't even bought his plane ticket yet. When is the absolute deadline he has to put his flight in
If he's too late he can find his own way to the resort he will be fine.
For the migration form link, can one person do 6 peoples form? Because it asks if we are traveling with other people and what their information is
let each person do their own
safe travels today my man. see y'all out here soon
